# Notice

Ian Xiaohei Scenes is an AI-agent skill created by Ian.

The bundled example images in `examples/images/` and `real-object-illustrations/assets/examples/` were generated by Ian and are included as template masters and style calibration examples for this skill.

The recurring character "Xiaohei" is part of Ian's visual language for article illustrations. When redistributing or adapting this repository, please keep the `Ian Xiaohei Scenes` name or provide attribution to Ian in your derived documentation.

`07-long-scroll-story-master.png` intentionally includes Ian's personal story labels and recognizable third-party names as a long-scroll quality master. Downstream users can keep it as a style reference, or replace the facts with their own story nodes when generating new images.

Author links:
